title: Fix Version 5 Deployment Error - Stripe Integration

requirements.summary: Diagnose and resolve the deployment error that occurred during Version 5 production launch, ensuring the Stripe payment integration deploys successfully
acceptanceCriteria: Version 5 deploys successfully to production without errors
All Stripe payment integration features remain functional after deployment
Backend actor compiles and initializes correctly on the network

file_operations.description: Review and fix the createCheckoutSession mutation to ensure proper JSON parsing and validation of the Stripe session response. Verify that the mutation correctly parses the backend response as CheckoutSession type with id and url fields, and throws an error if the url is missing. Add explicit error handling for malformed responses that may cause deployment issues.

Review and fix the checkout flow to ensure proper validation before redirecting to Stripe. Verify that the component validates session.url exists before using window.location.href, never navigates to '/undefined', and shows appropriate error messages if the session is invalid. Ensure the component follows the Stripe component usage instructions exactly as specified.

Review the payment success page implementation to ensure it properly handles the Stripe callback flow and invalidates cart queries correctly. Verify that the component is wired into the router at path '/payment-success' and handles all success scenarios without causing runtime errors during deployment.

Review the payment failure page implementation to ensure it properly handles Stripe callback errors. Verify that the component is wired into the router at path '/payment-failure' and provides clear error messaging without causing deployment issues.

Verify that the payment success and failure routes are correctly registered at paths '/payment-success' and '/payment-failure' respectively. Ensure these routes match exactly what is passed to the backend createCheckoutSession function as successUrl and cancelUrl parameters. Confirm proper route configuration to prevent routing errors during deployment.

Review the Stripe configuration component to ensure it properly checks isStripeConfigured() before showing the admin setup panel. Verify that the component does not cause initialization errors during deployment and that the Stripe configuration flow completes successfully without blocking the deployment process.
